name: applycairn
description: A private, local-first job-search ecosystem from resume intake through discovery, applications, tracking, outreach, and interviews

interface.shortDescription: Run your complete job search from one private workspace.
interface.longDescription: Start with a resume, search one role or many, score and track opportunities, tailor truthful application packets, research companies and public contacts, reconcile replies, and prepare for interviews.
defaultPrompt: Find and score new jobs for every search lane.
